name: CrowdStrike Exposure Management
description: Query CrowdStrike Spotlight (Exposure Management) to identify which hosts are exposed to a given CVE and which vulnerabilities affect a given asset.

options.name: CrowdStrike API URL
options.description: The base URL for the CrowdStrike API. Defaults to https://api.crowdstrike.com. Do not include a trailing slash.

options.name: Client ID
options.description: The OAuth2 Client ID for your CrowdStrike API credentials. Requires the vulnerabilities:read and hosts:read scopes.

options.name: Client Secret
options.description: The OAuth2 Client Secret associated with the Client ID.

options.name: CrowdStrike UI URL
options.description: The base URL for the CrowdStrike Falcon UI, used to generate deep-links. Defaults to https://falcon.crowdstrike.com.

options.name: Max Results Per Lookup
options.description: The maximum number of vulnerability records to return per entity lookup. Defaults to 20.

options.name: Enable Installed Patch Data
options.description: When checked, the integration will also fetch installed patch data for hostname and AID lookups. Requires the spotlight-patch:read scope.

options.name: Enable Evaluation Logic
options.description: When checked, evaluation logic detail is included in the facet query and displayed in a collapsible section.
